---
title: "Harriet Rosa Moberly"
---

## Harriet Rosa Moberly

**Dates:** (1835-1885)

### Description

niece of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

One of the ‘Indian Moberlys’, sister of Henry Edward Moberly.

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
